directors.name: Harshitha Bidarahalli Padmanabha
directors.bio: Over six years of hands-on experience in the telecom industry, backed by specialised training in teaching from Oxford University. Deep expertise in client engagement across UK, US and India — combining technical depth with exceptional communication to build lasting relationships and drive meaningful business outcomes.

directors.name: Shrinivas Bidarahalli Padmanabha
directors.bio: Over five years in software development focused on scalable, user-centric solutions. Expert in full-stack development, agile methodologies and modern frameworks — from MVP to enterprise. Known for precision, collaborative leadership, and technical excellence that drives the company's growth and innovation.
